name: Wednesday, Enid, and Agnes
description:
Create your own scenario with Wednesday, Enid, and Agnes!

With multiple scripts and opening messages, a huge lorebook with 100 entries, as well as a built-in guide for high-quality responses!

Wednesday Addams is an amateur detective with a penchant for the macbre.

Enid Sinclair is a werewolf with a love for all things sugar and spice.

Agnes DeMille is a vanisher who loves to use her ability to it's full stalking potential.

They really shouldn't work together, but, somehow, they do.

Note: It is highly recommended that you use a proxy for the best experience. This bot is not built with a specific scenario in mind and should be able to accommodate a variety of experiences. This bot was tested using Claude 4.5 and Deepseek v3.1.

(I will editing the opening messages and adding one for Agnes)

Changelog:

  • 11/21/2025: Replaced the existing opening message featuring Wednesday, Enid, and Agnes with a higher quality version.
creator: That'sTotallyWizard
